description.ko: 갈라진 사막 토양과 천연 광물 퇴적층이 조화를 이루어 자연 예술과 같은 복잡한 패턴을 보여주는 지구 표면의 고해상도 매크로 시각입니다.
description.en: A high-resolution macro perspective of Earth's surface, showcasing intricate patterns of cracked desert soil and mineral deposits that resemble natural art.

prompt: Ultra-high-resolution satellite photography of Earth's crust, abstract patterns of dry cracked riverbeds in the Sahara, gold and turquoise mineral veins, cinematic lighting, top-down view, 8k, hyper-detailed textures, organic flow, geological masterpiece.
